name: Equillium, Inc.
business: Equillium is a biotechnology innovator developing novel therapies to treat severe autoimmune and inflammatory disorders. Its primary goal is to advance EQ504, a novel aryl hydrocarbon receptor (AhR) modulator, into and through clinical development. It also has EQ302, a preclinical-stage bi-specific inhibitor for GI indications including celiac disease.
sellsTo: patients with autoimmune and inflammatory disorders

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology innovator developing novel therapies to treat severe autoimmune and inflammatory disorders with the mission to develop life-changing therapeutics for patients.

catalysts.event: Commence Phase 1 proof-of-mechanism study for EQ504
catalysts.sentence: We intend to commence a Phase 1 proof-of-mechanism study for EQ504, a preclinical stage, novel AhR modulator, in mid-2026, with data expected to follow approximately six months thereafter; provided, however, we cannot provide any assurances that we will be able to obtain data within those time frames or that the data which may be obtained will be favorable to the further clinical development of EQ504.

catalysts.event: March Private Placement closing for $35 million gross proceeds
catalysts.sentence: The closing of the March Private Placement occurred on March 13, 2026.
